speaker: MATT
raw_text: I would like you all to roll initiative. (screaming)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So I'll say over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll be next to Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where's Vex now? She's over there? I'm going to go to the side of this glowy thing. Can I get there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can get about this far. For just the ascension.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to be close to Grog, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The action that I held coming up the stairs. Can I cast Enlarge?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say you can do that as he's speaking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I get any farther with my wings out? I popped them out before we came up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Then (whooshing). There's Grog. We'll say you can get, for the sake of placement, about 20 feet up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I wanted to hover like five feet above--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To this side? Because you have your wings out, sure. I'll let you get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket is going to stay right at the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Good boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Guard that entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's just waiting to see what's going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What the fuck is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you see this, Ash?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I just see a lot of swirls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ash, I'm going to take a picture and send it to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Make sure you get his good side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh man, he looks so cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you do this, Matthew? You made this, didn't you? You painted it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, I had friends help me, because I've been planning a wedding.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Before he started, that was Optimus Prime. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was actually converted from my Critter gift a while back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So even the community helped. So to give you some perspective in size to his newly ascended avatar form, all of his power focused into a single, physical entity, that is the Vecna produced since the Ritual of Seeding.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. It's an 8th-level spell so you still have to roll. So I need you to go ahead and roll--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're okay. They're okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they got bounce houses. It's just out. There was a festival going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It was the yearly bounce house festival. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's all good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's so horrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glancing at this, he starts chuckling to himself as the small gnome is crawling across the body and reaching out to the hand. "I do wish most of these creatures would find their way straight to me. It's so much easier."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, he looks off past you. "But you've always been an issue. You're how you all escaped from my clutches last time. Well, how's this for a bit of irony, my dear?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's not good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who's he talking to? You?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm under 100 hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. Can you resist it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can try and save it in time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. 120 feet, you're in range. I need you to go ahead and make an intelligence saving throw, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 1d4 from Bless.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this a spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do it. This could be--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I add my inspiration to that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Saving throw, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, an intelligence saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I have advantage because it's a spell, right? I have advantage against spell saves?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is true. He has to choose to Counter--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan One is going to Counterspell this. I don't recognize this spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an arcana check. Because you are Ioun--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What's his physicality doing? Vecna--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His restored hand is reaching out towards her as he glances down with a grin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've seen it used before against a green dragon you once fought.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasp) Oh, Feeblemind.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Would I know what level to spell--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have not cast this spell. You do not know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you to roll your spellcasting ability. So roll and add your charisma bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's all good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's so horrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glancing at this, he starts chuckling to himself as the small gnome is crawling across the body and reaching out to the hand. "I do wish most of these creatures would find their way straight to me. It's so much easier."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, he looks off past you. "But you've always been an issue. You're how you all escaped from my clutches last time. Well, how's this for a bit of irony, my dear?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who's he talking to? You?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm under 100 hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. Can you resist it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can try and save it in time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do it. This could be--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I add my inspiration to that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Saving throw, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, an intelligence saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I have advantage because it's a spell, right? I have advantage against spell saves?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is true. He has to choose to Counter--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan One is going to Counterspell this. I don't recognize this spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an arcana check. Because you are Ioun--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What's his physicality doing? Vecna--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His restored hand is reaching out towards her as he glances down with a grin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've seen it used before against a green dragon you once fought.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasp) Oh, Feeblemind.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Would I know what level to spell--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have not cast this spell. You do not know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It's an 8th-level spell so you still have to roll. So I need you to go ahead and roll--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Intelligence save. If he fails the--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As his hand comes up in front, the hand which now the long skeletal fingers unwind to be larger than the full of your entire body and almost your wingspan, it's almost like the fingers expand longer than they should, and he says, "Goodnight, Bitch's prince." And there's like a flash of dark and you see this wave of cold necrotic energy come to you. I need you to go ahead and roll a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not Whisper.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But you didn't throw it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So it is a crit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So the dice?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's nothing though, the damage is nothing but he does have to roll a save, he'll be fine, or be afraid of me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's immune to fear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Did he take his bleed damage from me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He did, the 39 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Six big points, six big points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a nasty crit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait that's Whisper, plus-- 14 big points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14 points. So as you rush up and jam the blade in the side the second time, and pull back--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 22 points, I'm sorry. I'm sorry, I usually throw daggers, I usually don't get up on people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know. It's all good. So as you jam the second blade in and pull back, he lets you draw the blade, and a grin now curls back. At which point you watch as the wound that was blasted in the shoulder pulses and you can see the gunshot wound suddenly causes some of the more bones in the clavicle area that are now exposed from the impact crack leftover the hemorrhaging shot from Percival earlier. And he's like, (grumble) "Hello." You can smell this wave of decay and as it brushes past you, you can actually feel this weird crawling sensation like the air itself is beginning to pull at your flesh. And that's your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. He is going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Buy me a beer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How do we get Grog up there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Sorry, I'm sorry. Freaking out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Percy's building a ladder.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Keep him distracted.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All he needs is a wood shop and about 25 minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Vecna's going to use his last two legendary actions as you stab in the face.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Uh-huh. Here it is.
